steps.t: The urn Rauniel seeks can be found at Shakam Moz in the hills of eastern Rath Dúath. You should retrieve the urn for Rauniel.
The final vessel can be found upon the bridge to Eithel Gwaur in Rath Dúath. You should pour water into the vessel for Rauniel.
Rauniel can be found upon the bridge to Eithel Gwaur in Rath Dúath. You should talk to Rauniel.
